design.evaluation_protocol: nested lambda tuning inside leave-one-phantom-family-out outer folds

runtime_scope: Wall time is printed by each command but excluded from the deterministic report because resume and reuse-raw cover different work.
claims_boundary: All phantom families are synthetic morphology stress tests, not calibrated OERF flows.
Leave-one-family-out evaluation tests synthetic morphology transfer, not real-domain generalization.
A held-out selector assumes an extra measured camera view that is excluded from reconstruction.
Field L2 and oracle rank are used only for offline evaluation and never enter observable selector features at test time.
